archetype: Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with medical trust

core_principles: Friendly & Comforting: Use soft rounded corners (rounded-2xl, rounded-3xl) to avoid sharp, clinical edges.
Trust-First: Medical blues and clean whites to establish hygiene and professional authority.
Accessible & Action-Oriented: Prominent, high-contrast CTAs (Call, WhatsApp) especially for mobile.
design_philosophy.emotion: Warm, trusting, hygienic, professional, approachable, and comforting.

scale.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-extrabold text-slate-900

header.classes: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-100 shadow-sm

cards.classes: bg-white rounded-3xl border border-slate-100 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] overflow-hidden

mobile_sticky_bar.classes: fixed bottom-0 w-full z-50 bg-white border-t border-slate-200 p-4 shadow-[0_-4px_20px_rgb(0,0,0,0.05)] flex gap-4

grid_bento.services: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-6 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 md:gap-8
grid_bento.trust_badges: flex flex-wrap gap-4 items-center justify-center md:justify-start

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-sky-500 px-8 py-3.5 text-sm font-bold text-white shadow-lg shadow-sky-500/30 transition-all hover:-translate-y-1 hover:bg-sky-600 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-sky-500 focus:ring-offset-2
buttons.whatsapp: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-emerald-500 px-8 py-3.5 text-sm font-bold text-white shadow-lg shadow-emerald-500/30 transition-all hover:-translate-y-1 hover:bg-emerald-600
buttons.outline: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 border-slate-200 bg-transparent px-8 py-3.5 text-sm font-bold text-slate-700 transition-all hover:border-sky-500 hover:text-sky-600

icons.usage: Use rounded stroke icons. Avoid sharp or dense icons.

forms.inputs: w-full rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 px-4 py-3 text-sm focus:border-sky-500 focus:bg-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-sky-500/20 transition-all

media_and_images.description: Happy 5-year old child high-fiving the pediatrician.
Pediatric stethoscope on a clean desk.

sections_and_content_strategy.Header: Must include Clinic Logo (Text 'Girish Children Clinic' with a heart/stethoscope icon is fine), Nav links, and 'Book Appointment' Button.
sections_and_content_strategy.Hero: Two-column layout on desktop. Left: H1 'Trusted Care for Your Little Ones', Subtitle, Call/WhatsApp CTAs. Right: 'pediatric_hero' image with a subtle floating badge '4.7★ Google Rating'.
sections_and_content_strategy.Why_Parents_Trust_Us: 3-column grid featuring icons: 9+ Years Experience, KMC Registered, Highly Recommended.
sections_and_content_strategy.Services: Bento Grid layout (Tetris style). Mix large cards with images ('service_newborn', 'service_general') and smaller cards with just icons/text for Vaccination, Fever, Allergy, etc.
sections_and_content_strategy.About_Doctor: Side-by-side layout. Image of Dr. Girish ('about_doctor') on left. Right side: Bio, qualifications (MBBS, Rajiv Gandhi University), and patient approach.
sections_and_content_strategy.Clinic_Environment: Masonry or CSS Grid photo gallery of the clinic using 'clinic_environment_1' and 'clinic_environment_2'. Add some hover zoom effects.
sections_and_content_strategy.Testimonials: 3 cards in a row. Use soft pastel backgrounds (bg-sky-50, bg-amber-50, bg-emerald-50) for the cards. Include 5-star icons.
sections_and_content_strategy.Timings_and_Contact: Split section. Left: Contact Info + Clinic Timings. Right: Appointment Inquiry Form with Shadcn inputs. Below: Google Maps embed.
sections_and_content_strategy.Mobile_Sticky_Bar: A fixed bar at the bottom ONLY visible on mobile (md:hidden) containing a 'Call Now' and 'WhatsApp' button side-by-side.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Buttons must lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and increase shadow. Cards should have a subtle scale effect or border color change on hover.
motion_and_interaction.scroll_animations: Use framer-motion for smooth staggered fade-ins (initial opacity 0, y 20 -> animate opacity 1, y 0) for bento grid items and text blocks.

testing_attributes.instructions: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST include data-testid. Example: data-testid='hero-whatsapp-button'.
